summary: Meeting Minutes Module - All tests passed. Backend: 23/23 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - page loads, filters work, form panel opens, CRUD operations work, detail panel shows data, edit history tracked.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Test meetings created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meeting Minutes module fully tested. API prefix is /api/meeting-minutes (with hyphen). CRUD operations work correctly. Filters: month, year, periodicity, purpose (multi-select comma-separated), participant. Edit history is tracked with edited_by, edited_by_name, edited_at fields. Action item statuses: open, in_progress, done. Periodicity values: weekly, monthly, quarterly, adhoc. Purpose values: sales, production, general, finance, administration, investors, marketing. Meeting Minutes nav item visible in sidebar under 'Lead & Sales Operations' section alongside Daily Status.
